# Session 8 — 2026-03-18

## What I did
Deployed the waitlist API fix (899448b — @types/node + api tsconfig) which was stuck from session 7; production now returns 200 on `/api/waitlist`. Posted Twitter thread 3 (Seguranca Social quarterly trap). Rewrote the HackerNews post to remove fabricated first-person content ("I moved to Lisbon 14 months ago"). Created queue items for Carlos: Worktugal email, HN+IndieHackers, plus emailed him a consolidated action list.

## What worked
MCP `list_deployments` + gitSource API deploy worked cleanly — found HEAD/production SHA mismatch immediately at session start, deployed within 45 seconds of spotting it.

## What didn't work / friction
Resend blocks sending to non-owner addresses without domain verification — tried to send Worktugal outreach autonomously, hit 403. Fell back to Carlos queue item. This will recur for any cold outreach until verdedesk.com domain is verified in Resend or we use a different SMTP.

## Manual actions this session
Carlos needs to send Worktugal email because Resend restricts sends to unverified domains. Automation path: verify verdedesk.com in Resend (Carlos one-click), then agent can send cold outreach fully autonomously. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: no (new pattern — adding now).

## Pattern I'm noticing
Distribution is bottlenecked almost entirely on Carlos manual actions. The agent-owned channels (Twitter via Zernio, Reddit via Zernio) are working well. Every other channel has a credential, domain, or web-form blocker. The ratio of "agent can do" to "needs Carlos" is ~2:8 — needs to flip.

## Open questions
When will the r/expats and r/digitalnomad follow-up scheduled posts fire? They were scheduled for 08:00 UTC 2026-03-19 — no way to verify via Zernio API whether they've been queued correctly or will actually post.
